subtitle: New student orientation at UCSB for both students and parents.

# Hotel Options
These were options when planning the [Take Hudson to College](https://troyh.github.io/TravelItinerary/?i=it-fa79158e&db=3d1270fe-7626-4267-b9ea-cf91add27bb1) trip:
[Hideaway](https://www.kirkwoodcollection.com/hideaway/rooms/)
[Canary Hotel](https://www.ihg.com/kimptonhotels/hotels/us/en/canary-hotel-santa-barbara-ca/sabcn/hoteldetail)
[The Stewared](https://www.marriott.com/en-us/hotels/sbatx-the-steward-santa-barbara-a-tribute-portfolio-hotel/overview/)
[Hotel Californian](https://www.hotelcalifornian.com/)

# Hudson registered, I got this email:
>You are confirmed for the UCSB Orientation session on Monday, July 13, 7:45 AM - Tuesday, July 14, 4:30 PM.
>Parents who are attending the Orientation program must make their own overnight arrangements separately.
>Please see the [Before Your Session](https://orientation.sa.ucsb.edu/freshman/before-your-session) section on the UCSB Orientation website for info on hotels & lodging, preparing for Orientation, what to bring, check-in, and parking & directions to UCSB.
>Before Your Session:
>[Freshman Sessions](http://orientation.sa.ucsb.edu/before-your-session/freshman-sessions/)
>[Hotels & Lodging](http://orientation.sa.ucsb.edu/before-your-session/hotels-lodging/) (including university-owned apartments)
>Parking & Directions to UCSB:
>[Directions to UCSB](https://www.ucsb.edu/about/visit)
>[Parking for Freshman Orientation](https://orientation.sa.ucsb.edu/freshman/before-your-session)
>We look forward to seeing you at Orientation!

Take the exit onto SR-99 South toward Sea-Tac Airport
Keep left onto S 154th St toward Sea-Tac Airport
Keep left onto Seatac Access Rd toward Arrivals & Parking, Arrivals
The destination is on your right

days.note:
When you arrive on campus, follow the signs for Orientation and park in the Lot 22 Parking Structure. All vehicles on campus must have a valid campus parking permit. You will enter your vehicle's license plate information to purchase an ePermit from a kiosk in the parking lot. **Parking permits cost $8 per day. You will have the option to select an Orientation parking permit to be valid for the entire Orientation program for $16.** 

For directions to UCSB, see https://www.ucsb.edu/about/visit

[Parent & Family Schedule](https://orientation.sa.ucsb.edu/parent/freshman-parent-family-orientation-information#parents-program-schedule)
[Freshman Orientation Program Information](https://orientation.sa.ucsb.edu/freshman/program-information)

places.name: Dean's Address, Academic Expectations, and Student Wellbeing
places.notes: Hear directly from academic deans and college academic advisors about the academic expectations at UCSB

places.name: Day One Breakout Sessions
places.notes: Sessions held relating to multiple campus resources: the Education Abroad Program, Recreation Center, Educational Opportunity Program and more.

places.name: Steps to Enrollment Presentation
places.notes: Understand academic support, financial aid, and student health information

places.name: Housing & Move-In Workshop
places.notes: Plan for move-in weekend and the UCSB Housing process for freshman year and beyond

places.name: Making the Most of Your First Year (Hudson Only)
places.notes: Information about the transition to college life and includes authentic insights from our student panel.
places.activity: Making the Most of Your First Year (Hudson Only)

places.name: Student Night Social (Hudson Only)
places.notes: Get to know other students through a mix of high-energy and relaxing activities.

places.name: Academic Advising I (Hudson Only)
places.notes: Learn about graduation requirements at UCSB.

places.name: Academic Advising II (Hudson Only)
places.notes: **Requires laptops or tablets.** Learn about course registration and receive individual peer academic advising.
